res.config.settings.string: Allow users to import data from CSV/XLS/XLSX/ODS files
res.config.settings.name: module_base_import

res.config.settings.string: Allow the users to synchronize their calendar  with Google Calendar
res.config.settings.name: module_google_calendar

res.config.settings.string: Allow the users to synchronize their calendar with Outlook Calendar
res.config.settings.name: module_microsoft_calendar

res.config.settings.string: Allow integration with the mail plugins
res.config.settings.name: module_mail_plugin

res.config.settings.string: Attach Google documents to any record
res.config.settings.name: module_google_drive

res.config.settings.help: Footer text displayed at the bottom of all reports.
res.config.settings.name: report_footer

res.config.settings.help: Allows to work in a multi currency environment
res.config.settings.name: group_multi_currency

res.config.settings.help: If you have setup a catch-all email domain redirected to the Odoo server, enter the domain name here.
res.config.settings.name: alias_domain

res.config.settings.help:
Users will still be able to render templates.
However only Mail Template Editors will be able to create new dynamic templates or modify existing ones.
res.config.settings.name: restrict_template_rendering

res.config.settings.help: If you want to use twilio as TURN/STUN server provider
res.config.settings.name: use_twilio_rtc_servers

res.config.settings.help: Necessary for some functionalities in the map view
res.config.settings.name: map_box_token

res.config.settings.string: Enable password reset from Login page
res.config.settings.name: auth_signup_reset_password

res.config.settings.string: Template user for new users created through signup
res.config.settings.name: auth_signup_template_user_id

res.config.settings.help:
Allows to manage different prices based on rules per category of customers.
                Example: 10% for retailers, promotion of 5 EUR on this product, etc.
res.config.settings.name: group_sale_pricelist

res.config.settings.help:
Multiple prices: Pricelists with fixed price rules by product,
Advanced rules: enables advanced price rules for pricelists.
res.config.settings.name: product_pricelist_setting

res.config.settings.help: The URL to generate the authorization code from Google
res.config.settings.name: google_drive_uri_copy

res.config.settings.string: Disable link redirection to mobile app
res.config.settings.help: Check this if dynamic mobile-app detection links cause problems for your installation. This will stop the automatic wrapping of links inside outbound emails. The links will always open in a normal browser, even for users who have the Android/iOS app installed.
res.config.settings.name: disable_redirect_firebase_dynamic_link

res.config.settings.string: Sign Terms & Conditions as a Web page
res.config.settings.name: sign_terms_html

res.config.settings.help:
Terms in Email - The text will be displayed at the bottom of every signature request email.

        Terms as Web Page - A link will be pasted at the bottom of every signature request email, leading to your content.
res.config.settings.name: sign_terms_type

res.config.settings.help: Main currency of the company.
res.config.settings.name: currency_id

res.config.settings.help: The accounting journal where automatic exchange differences will be registered
res.config.settings.name: currency_exchange_journal_id

res.config.settings.help:
Bank Transactions are posted immediately after import or synchronization. Their counterparty is the bank suspense account.
Reconciliation replaces the latter by the definitive account(s).
res.config.settings.name: account_journal_suspense_account_id

res.config.settings.help:
Incoming payments are posted on an Outstanding Receipts Account. In the bank reconciliation widget, they appear as blue lines.
Bank transactions are then reconciled on the Outstanding Receipts Accounts rather than the Receivable Account.
res.config.settings.name: account_journal_payment_debit_account_id

res.config.settings.help:
Outgoing Payments are posted on an Outstanding Payments Account. In the bank reconciliation widget, they appear as blue lines.
Bank transactions are then reconciled on the Outstanding Payments Account rather the Payable Account.
res.config.settings.name: account_journal_payment_credit_account_id

res.config.settings.help: Intermediary account used when moving from a liquidity account to another.
res.config.settings.name: transfer_account_id

res.config.settings.help:
This allows you grouping payments into a single batch and eases the reconciliation process.
-This installs the account_batch_payment module.
res.config.settings.name: module_account_batch_payment

res.config.settings.help:
Allows you to import FEC files.
-This installs the l10n_fr_fec_import module.
res.config.settings.name: module_l10n_fr_fec_import

res.config.settings.help: Account that will be set on lines created in cash basis journal entry and used to keep track of the tax base amount.
res.config.settings.name: account_cash_basis_base_account_id

res.config.settings.help: The country to use the tax reports from for this company
res.config.settings.name: account_fiscal_country_id

res.config.settings.help: International Commercial Terms are a series of predefined commercial terms used in international transactions.
res.config.settings.name: incoterm_id

res.config.settings.string: Terms & Conditions as a Web page
res.config.settings.name: invoice_terms_html

res.config.settings.help:
Track following dates on Inventory Items: best before, removal, end of life, alert. 
 Such dates are set automatically at Inventory Item creation based on values set on the product (in days).
res.config.settings.name: module_product_expiry

res.config.settings.string: Display Inventory Items on Delivery Slips
res.config.settings.name: group_lot_on_delivery_slip

res.config.settings.help:
Add and customize route operations to process product moves in your warehouse(s): e.g. unload > quality control > stock for incoming products, pick > pack > ship for outgoing products. 
 You can also set putaway strategies on warehouse locations in order to send incoming products into specific child locations straight away (e.g. specific bins, racks).
res.config.settings.name: group_stock_adv_location

res.config.settings.help: Group your move operations in wave transfer to process them together
res.config.settings.name: group_stock_picking_wave

res.config.settings.help: Email sent to the customer once the order is done.
res.config.settings.name: stock_mail_confirmation_template_id

res.config.settings.help: Store products in specific locations of your warehouse (e.g. bins, racks) and to track inventory accordingly.
res.config.settings.name: group_stock_multi_locations

res.config.settings.help: Annual inventory month for products not in a location with a cyclic inventory date. Set to no month if no automatic annual inventory.
res.config.settings.name: annual_inventory_month

res.config.settings.help:
Day of the month when the annual inventory should occur. If zero or negative, then the first day of the month will be selected instead.
        If greater than the last day of a month, then the last day of the month will be selected instead.
res.config.settings.name: annual_inventory_day

res.config.settings.help: Only users with the 'Adviser' role can edit accounts prior to and inclusive of this date. Use it for period locking inside an open fiscal year, for example.
res.config.settings.name: period_lock_date

res.config.settings.help: No users, including Advisers, can edit accounts prior to and inclusive of this date. Use it for fiscal year locking for example.
res.config.settings.name: fiscalyear_lock_date

res.config.settings.help: No users can edit journal entries related to a tax prior and inclusive of this date.
res.config.settings.name: tax_lock_date

res.config.settings.help: Every payment and invoice before this date will receive the 'From Invoicing' status, hiding all the accounting entries related to it. Use this option after installing Accounting if you were using only Invoicing before, before importing all your actual accounting data in to Odoo.
res.config.settings.name: invoicing_switch_threshold

res.config.settings.help:
Select the format corresponding to the check paper you will be printing your checks on.
In order to disable the printing feature, select 'None'.
res.config.settings.name: account_check_printing_layout

res.config.settings.help:
This option allows you to print the date label on the check as per CPA.
Disable this if your pre-printed check includes the date label.
res.config.settings.name: account_check_printing_date_label

res.config.settings.help: This option allows you to print check details (stub) on multiple pages if they don't fit on a single page.
res.config.settings.name: account_check_printing_multi_stub

res.config.settings.help: Adjust the margins of generated checks to make it fit your printer's settings.
res.config.settings.name: account_check_printing_margin_top

res.config.settings.help: Adjust the margins of generated checks to make it fit your printer's settings.
res.config.settings.name: account_check_printing_margin_left

res.config.settings.help: Adjust the margins of generated checks to make it fit your printer's settings.
res.config.settings.name: account_check_printing_margin_right

res.config.settings.string: OCR Single Invoice Line Per Tax
res.config.settings.name: extract_single_line_per_tax

res.config.settings.help: Security days for each manufacturing operation.
res.config.settings.name: manufacturing_lead

res.config.settings.help: Purchase Order Modification used when you want to purchase order editable after confirm
res.config.settings.name: po_lock

res.config.settings.help: Provide a double validation mechanism for purchases
res.config.settings.name: po_double_validation

res.config.settings.help: Minimum amount for which a double validation is required
res.config.settings.name: po_double_validation_amount

res.config.settings.help: This default value is applied to any new product created. This can be changed in the product detail form.
res.config.settings.name: default_purchase_method

res.config.settings.help: Margin of error for vendor lead times. When the system generates Purchase Orders for procuring products, they will be scheduled that many days earlier to cope with unexpected vendor delays.
res.config.settings.name: po_lead

res.config.settings.help: Margin of error for vendor lead times. When the system generates Purchase Orders for reordering products,they will be scheduled that many days earlier to cope with unexpected vendor delays.
res.config.settings.name: use_po_lead

res.config.settings.help: Allow automatically send email to remind your vendor the receipt date
res.config.settings.name: group_send_reminder

res.config.settings.help: Affect landed costs on reception operations and split them among products to update their cost price.
res.config.settings.name: module_stock_landed_costs

res.config.settings.help: SMS sent to the customer once the order is done.
res.config.settings.name: stock_sms_confirmation_template_id
res.config.settings.value: Delivery: Send by SMS Text Message

res.config.settings.help: When ticked, totals and subtotals appear below the sections of the report.
res.config.settings.name: totals_below_sections

res.config.settings.help: Periodicity
res.config.settings.name: account_tax_periodicity

res.config.settings.help: Days needed to confirm a PO, define when a PO should be validated
res.config.settings.name: days_to_purchase

res.config.settings.help: Allows you to send pro-forma invoice.
res.config.settings.name: group_proforma_sales

res.config.settings.help: Default product used for payment advances
res.config.settings.name: deposit_default_product_id

res.config.settings.help:
The invoice is generated automatically and available in the customer portal when the transaction is confirmed by the payment acquirer.
The invoice is marked as paid and the payment is registered in the payment journal defined in the configuration of the payment acquirer.
This mode is advised if you issue the final invoice at the order and not after the delivery.
res.config.settings.name: automatic_invoice

res.config.settings.help: Email sent to the customer once the order is paid.
res.config.settings.name: confirmation_mail_template_id

res.config.settings.string: Force Lot Validation on Inventory Adjustment
res.config.settings.name: force_lot_validation_on_inventory_adjustment

res.config.settings.help: TIC (Taxability Information Codes) allow to get specific tax rates for each product type. This default value applies if no product is used in the order/invoice, or if no TIC is set on the product or its product category. By default, TaxCloud relies on the TIC *[0] Uncategorized* default referring to general goods and services.
res.config.settings.name: tic_category_id

res.config.settings.help: Margin of error for dates promised to customers. Products will be scheduled for procurement and delivery that many days earlier than the actual promised date, to cope with unexpected delays in the supply chain.
res.config.settings.name: security_lead

res.config.settings.help: Margin of error for dates promised to customers. Products will be scheduled for delivery that many days earlier than the actual promised date, to cope with unexpected delays in the supply chain.
res.config.settings.name: use_security_lead

res.config.settings.help: Set default label printing format
res.config.settings.name: print_labels_format

res.config.settings.string: Use Attachments Printing for Shipping Label(s)
res.config.settings.name: print_sl_from_attachment

res.config.settings.string: Print Package just after Shipping Label
res.config.settings.name: print_package_with_label

res.config.settings.string: Disable fit to the page size
res.config.settings.name: printnode_fit_to_page

res.config.settings.help: In the Sales Dashboard, the display of Entered Margin, Backlog Margin, and Billed Margin would all be multiplied by Sales Board Margin Value
res.config.settings.name: sales_board_margin_value

res.company.help: Used to order Companies in the company switcher
res.company.name: sequence

res.company.name: report_header

res.company.name: company_details

res.company.help: That is the date of the opening entry.

res.company.name: account_dashboard_onboarding_state

res.company.name: account_setup_bill_state

res.company.name: expense_accrual_account_id

res.company.help: Account used to move the period of a revenue

res.company.name: internal_transit_location_id

res.company.name: payment_acquirer_onboarding_state

res.company.help: The tax units this company belongs to.
res.company.name: account_tax_unit_ids

res.company.help: Specify an Accounting Firm that will act as a representative when exporting reports.
res.company.name: account_representative_id

res.company.string: State of the sale onboarding panel
res.company.name: sale_quotation_onboarding_state

res.company.name: sale_onboarding_order_confirmation_state

res.company.string: State of the onboarding sample quotation step
res.company.name: sale_onboarding_sample_quotation_state

res.company.help: Account used to write the journal item in case of gain while selling an asset
res.company.name: gain_account_id

res.company.help: Account used to write the journal item in case of loss while selling an asset
